              MODIFIED FILES:

              - apps/web/messages/ms.json — same key, English value as placeholder.
              - apps/web/src/components/ui/kibo-ui/gantt/* — Kibo install patched in 6 places for
                exactOptionalPropertyTypes strict-mode compliance (null-safe ?.year ?? fallback,
                | undefined on optional function-typed props, checked = false default on context-
                menu checkbox item). Same fix applied to context-menu.tsx Kibo also installed.

              DEP ADDITIONS (apps/web/package.json + pnpm-lock.yaml, second commit):
              @dnd-kit/modifiers ^9.0.0, @radix-ui/react-context-menu ^2.2.16, @uidotdev/usehooks

              PERMISSION FIX (sub-batch goal #2):
              PRODUCT.md line 229 grants Field Coordinator "schedule ranger assignments (Gantt)".
              Router previously locked create/update/delete to adminProcedure (site_admin+
              super_admin only). Now uses coordinatorProcedure (super_admin + site_admin +
